items.title: SEO action is returned with the current CTR metric
items.precondition: The local database contains the synthetic One Endodontics SEO metadata event created for this acceptance run.
steps: Request GET /api/patient-journey?locationId=14&month=2026-07 with a One Endodontics Pilot token.
Inspect the impressions stage actions array.
items.expected: The response is 200 and includes one active SEO metadata action tied to CTR with plain-English summary and measurement copy.
items.evidence: HTTP 200; impressions=17,952; action 97832888-c6a2-4e23-9fb7-f75a874a73cb; summary and August 14 measurement window returned.
items.notes: The API was served by this worktree on [::1]:3002 against the shared local database.

items.title: Google Visibility shows clicks, CTR, and the Alloro action note
items.precondition: Open One Endodontics in Pilot mode on the worktree frontend and select July 2026.
items.expected: The detail shows 456 Google clicks, 2.5% click-through rate, and an Alloro did this note with completion date, six-page summary, and August 14 watch window.
items.notes: Browser DOM and screenshot both matched the expected copy and values.

items.title: The action note remains readable on mobile
items.precondition: Google Visibility details are open at a 390 by 844 viewport.
steps: Inspect the action note and surrounding detail card.
Measure the action note and article scroll widths.
items.expected: All copy is visible without horizontal overflow or overlap.
items.notes: Action clientWidth=274 and scrollWidth=274; article clientWidth=324 and scrollWidth=324; no horizontal overflow.

items.title: The action note is absent outside its reporting period
items.precondition: The synthetic SEO action occurred on July 15, 2026.
items.expected: June retains its clicks and CTR metrics but does not show the July Alloro action note.
items.notes: June showed 816 clicks and 3.9% CTR with no Alloro action element in the browser DOM.

items.title: Automated verification remains clean
items.precondition: Feature implementation and focused test harness fix are present in the worktree.
steps: Run focused backend and frontend tests.
Run TypeScript, frontend build, docs build, convention checks, check:all, and the full backend test suite.
items.expected: All feature tests and required build gates pass with no errors caused by this work.
items.evidence: 32 focused backend tests, 3 focused frontend tests, 471 full backend tests, TypeScript, frontend build, docs build, check:conventions --strict, and check:all passed.
items.notes: check:all retained repository-existing warning output only.

items.title: Jo confirms the client-facing copy
items.precondition: Jo can review the desktop or mobile evidence, or the running worktree.
steps: Review the Alloro did this heading, completion date, action summary, and measurement note.
Confirm that the note communicates value without adding noise.
items.expected: Jo approves the copy for non-technical client users.
items.evidence: Dave directed -d finalization and merge to dev/dave on 2026-07-16 after the browser acceptance results were presented.
items.notes: Jo's review has not been recorded and remains recommended before production promotion.
items.waiver: Dave explicitly authorized finalization and the dev/dave merge without waiting for Jo; this does not claim Jo approval.
